channel.title: VS Code on :bit :of :binary
channel.description: Recent content in VS Code on :bit :of :binary

item.title: My Visual Studio Code Setup
item.description: This post is a part of the Project Restore, with the primary aim of excavating my previous writings. The material contained herein may not hold practical relevance and is most likely completely useless. When Microsoft announced Visual Studio Code in 2015, I did not have good things to say about it. However, times have changed and Visual Studio Code is my preferred code editor these days. The editor has come a long way and it is commendable that Microsoft is serious about maintaining VS Code.
